title: VIA Character Strengths (Simplified)
description: Identify your top 5 character strengths from 24 universal virtues. 24 questions, 3-4 minutes.

strengths.name: Creativity
strengths.description: Thinking of novel and productive ways to do things

strengths.name: Curiosity
strengths.description: Taking an interest in ongoing experience; finding all subjects fascinating

strengths.name: Judgment
strengths.description: Thinking things through and examining them from all sides

strengths.name: Love of Learning
strengths.description: Mastering new skills, topics, and bodies of knowledge

strengths.name: Perspective
strengths.description: Being able to provide wise counsel to others

strengths.name: Bravery
strengths.description: Not shrinking from threat, challenge, difficulty, or pain

strengths.name: Perseverance
strengths.description: Finishing what one starts; persisting despite obstacles

strengths.name: Honesty
strengths.description: Speaking the truth and presenting oneself genuinely

strengths.name: Zest
strengths.description: Approaching life with excitement and energy

strengths.name: Love
strengths.description: Valuing close relations with others; being close to people

strengths.name: Kindness
strengths.description: Doing favors and good deeds for others

strengths.name: Social Intelligence
strengths.description: Being aware of the motives and feelings of others

strengths.name: Teamwork
strengths.description: Working well as a member of a group or team

strengths.name: Fairness
strengths.description: Treating all people the same according to fairness and justice

strengths.name: Leadership
strengths.description: Organizing group activities and seeing they happen

strengths.name: Forgiveness
strengths.description: Forgiving those who have done wrong

strengths.name: Humility
strengths.description: Letting one's accomplishments speak for themselves

strengths.name: Prudence
strengths.description: Being careful about one's choices; not taking undue risks

strengths.name: Self-Regulation
strengths.description: Regulating what one feels and does

strengths.name: Appreciation of Beauty
strengths.description: Noticing and appreciating beauty and excellence

strengths.name: Gratitude
strengths.description: Being aware of and thankful for good things that happen

strengths.name: Hope
strengths.description: Expecting the best in the future and working to achieve it

strengths.name: Humor
strengths.description: Liking to laugh and tease; bringing smiles to others

strengths.name: Spirituality
strengths.description: Having coherent beliefs about higher purpose and meaning

questions.text: I often think of new ways to approach problems or tasks.
I am always asking questions about how things work.
I think carefully before making important decisions.
I love learning new things, even outside of school or work.
People often come to me for advice or wisdom.
I stand up for what I believe in, even when it's difficult.
Once I start something, I always see it through to the end.
I am always truthful, even when it's uncomfortable.
I approach life with enthusiasm and energy.
Close relationships are the most important thing in my life.
I go out of my way to help others.
I can easily sense what others are feeling.
I work well as part of a team or group.
I believe everyone should be treated equally.
I naturally take charge in group situations.
I forgive those who have wronged me.
I don't need recognition for my accomplishments.
I am careful and cautious in my choices.
I have strong self-control over my emotions and actions.
I notice and appreciate beauty in art, nature, and daily life.
I regularly express thanks for the good things in my life.
I am optimistic about the future.
I love to make people laugh.
I have a strong sense of life's deeper meaning and purpose.

scoring.note: Rank strengths by average score. Top 5 are signature strengths. Bottom 5 are lesser strengths (not weaknesses).
